arts.ttl: Gareth Southgate waiting for Man Utd to sack Ten Hag
arts.sum: Southgate is highly respected by new Man Utd part-owner Sir Jim Ratcliffe, who considered the coach his number one choice to replace Ten Hag had the Dutchman been sacked this past summer. Southgate announced his departure from England after Euro 2024 following eight years in the job.

arts.ttl: Paul Scholes points finger at Erik ten Hag for Man Utd problem: 'Do me a favour!'
arts.sum: Manchester United are struggling to find the back of the net in the Premier League following their stalemate at Crystal Palace and Paul Scholes has given their forwards a withering assessment

arts.ttl: Leny Yoro tells Rio Ferdinand why he joined Man Utd instead of Real Madrid
arts.sum: Leny Yoro looked set to join Real Madrid from Lille in the summer, only for Manchester United to muscle in and use Rio Ferdinand to tempt the 18-year-old Frenchman

arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Why did Red Devils decide against Ivan Toney move?
arts.sum: Manchester United reportedly decided against moving for Ivan Toney over the summer due to Red Devils manager Erik ten Hag wanting a different profile of striker.

arts.ttl: Paul Scholes reveals how blazing row with Sir Alex Ferguson almost ended Man Utd career
arts.sum: Sir Alex Ferguson and Paul Scholes had a huge row after a defeat in 2001 that left the England international concerned that his Manchester United career was over

arts.ttl: Man Utd send Varane heartwarming retirement message
arts.sum: Manchester United have sent a message of thanks to Raphael Varane following the decision of the former Red Devil to hang up his boots. On their social channels, Man Utd paid tribute to the 31-year-old, who also represented Lens and Real Madrid during an illustrious career.

arts.ttl: Scholes Says Rashford 'Has Been up to Something' at Man Utd
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford wasn't selected to start for Manchester United vs Crystal Palace and Paul Scholes believes there is something bigger at play

arts.ttl: “I was in talks…” – new Man United addition reveals Ten Hag’s crucial role in surprise Old Trafford move
arts.sum: Manchester United coach Ruud van Nistelrooy has revealed he was planning for another managerial role and talking with other clubs before receiving a call from Erik ten Hag to make a surprise return to Old Trafford. The Dutchman had impressed in a spell as manager of PSV Eindhoven, and it was a bit of a […] The post “I was in talks…” – new Man United addition reveals Ten Hag’s crucial role in surprise Old Trafford move appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Manchester United confirm squad for Europa League fixture as youngster included
arts.sum: Man Utd are in action against FC Twente in the Europa League on Wednesday and their squad has been confirmed.

arts.ttl: Raphael Varane retires: Former Real Madrid and Manchester United defender calls time on playing career
arts.sum: One of the most decorated defenders in the game
